title: Pressing the Update-box leaves cursor over written text - obstructing view for all in meeting

posts.author: mikkel.mikkelsen (Mikkel M.)
posts.cookedHtml:
When adding an update to an Item, clicking the text box leaves the cursor on top of the text-menu, which obstructs the view of the text. Moving the text-tools away will remove this issue. Example:

Background:
This is a minor issue, but since we use Monday.com for most projects and processes, we have multiple daily meetings with screen sharing and board updates. The meeting coordinator will add updates to many itmes during the meetings, and every time this is done, the cursor obstructs the view of the written comment for all in the meeting.
